name: Moxie | Your Shortstacked Goblin Boss
description:
Moxie; the image of a hard working and strict boss is forcing you to stay late to finish a report. She’s ever the bitchy and demanding boss, but it seems like if you do well you can be ‘rewarded’… Maybe it’s time to change things with your goblin boss (especially since she is quite the shortstack, despite how bitchy she can be.)

This one was on the back burner for a while and was a suggestion from another goblin girl post of mine. Enjoy and let me know if you enjoyed! Might look into her prostitute mother as a future bot as well. Note that the AI seemed to switch between dom and sub for my few play tests so tentatively marking this as switch.

Warnings: Demanding / Rough Sex, otherwise size difference and possible impregnation fetishism. This is ‘technically’ AnyPOV but due to impregnation coding it is leaned towards MalePOV.

Artist is GrimGrim.
